step_rationale: Component of atherogenic lipid profile; triglyceride-rich lipoprotein retains in subendothelium.
mechanism: Elevated triglycerides reflect accumulation of atherogenic lipoproteins in the intima, driving oxidative lipid modification and atherosclerotic plaque formation.
